tasks.title: Fix Hero Scroll Dead Zones
tasks.description: Tighten the 3-phase hero scroll timing to eliminate dead zones at 8-20% and 48-54% where nothing is visible. Reduce total pin from +=250% to +=200% for tighter pacing. Add subtle crossfade between phases.
tasks.details:
In HeroSection.tsx, retime the 3 text phases:
- Phase 1: visible 0-12%, exits 12-18%
- Phase 2: enters 16-22%, visible until 42%, exits 42-50%
- Phase 3: enters 48-56%, exits 72-82%
- Reduce minHeight from 350vh to 300vh, end from +=250% to +=200%
- Each phase transition should overlap slightly for crossfade (not hard cut)
tasks.testStrategy: Scroll through hero section slowly — no point should have empty screen. Each phase should seamlessly connect to next. Verify on desktop and mobile.

tasks.title: Cursor-Tracked 3D Notebook Tilt
tasks.description: Add mouse/cursor tracking to the 3D HeroNotebook so it tilts subtly toward the cursor. The hovered prop exists but is never used — wire it up with a shared cursor ref for zero re-renders.
tasks.details:
1. HeroSection.tsx: Track mouse position with onMouseMove, store normalized coords (-1 to 1) in a shared ref
2. Pass cursorRef through HeroScene to HeroNotebook
3. HeroNotebook useFrame: apply rotateX (cursor.y * 0.08) and rotateY (cursor.x * 0.12)
4. Smooth with same Math.pow(0.001, delta) lerp pattern
5. Tilt fades as book opens: multiply by (1 - open)
6. On hover: scale 1.0 -> 1.03
7. Mobile: disable (no persistent cursor)
tasks.testStrategy: Move mouse over hero — notebook should tilt toward cursor smoothly. Verify tilt fades when book opens. Check mobile has no tilt.

tasks.title: Section Restructure — Kill HowItWorks, Reorder, Inline Testimonials
tasks.description: Delete HowItWorksSection, move AIFeatureSection to position 3 (after PaperStyles), create inline testimonial cards (2-3 quotes with monogram avatars) that appear after AIFeature.
tasks.details:
1. LandingPage.tsx: Remove HowItWorksSection import and component
2. Move AIFeatureSection to after PaperStylesSection
3. Create InlineTestimonials.tsx component:
   - 3 cards in a row (desktop), stacked (mobile)
   - Each: monogram avatar (first letter, colored circle), quote, name+role
   - GSAP stagger entrance from bottom
   - Handwritten quotation marks (Caveat font)
4. New order: NavBar, Hero, Stats, PaperStyles, AI, Testimonials, BlockTypes, Aesthetics, FinalCTA, Footer
tasks.testStrategy: Verify HowItWorksSection is gone, AI section appears after papers, testimonial cards render with correct layout on desktop and mobile.

tasks.title: Continuous Ink Progress Line
tasks.description: Add a thin vertical ink line along the left viewport edge that draws downward as user scrolls — like a notebook margin line connecting all sections.
tasks.details:
1. LandingPage.tsx: Add fixed-position div (2px wide, indigo-brand)
2. Line draws via scaleY tied to scroll progress (GSAP ScrollTrigger)
3. Small dot at current position (pen tip) with indigo glow
4. Starts at bottom of StatsStrip, fades at FinalCTA
5. Z-index: above sections, below NavBar
6. Mobile: hidden below 768px
7. globals.css: ink-line styles + reduced-motion override (hidden)
tasks.testStrategy: Scroll page — line should draw smoothly. Verify hidden on mobile. Check reduced-motion hides it.

tasks.title: PaperStyles Large Live Preview Panel
tasks.description: Add a large preview panel to PaperStylesSection showing the selected paper style at full size with animated sample content.
tasks.details:
1. 2-column layout: grid left, preview right (stacked on mobile)
2. Preview: ~400px tall, CSS paper pattern filling it
3. Animated handwriting-font lines fade in when paper changes
4. GSAP crossfade transition: scale 0.98->1.0, opacity swap
5. Sample content: 3-4 lines of placeholder text in Patrick Hand font
tasks.testStrategy: Click different paper styles — preview should crossfade smoothly. Verify layout stacks on mobile. Sample text should animate in.

tasks.title: AIFeatureSection Real-Time Typing Simulation
tasks.description: Add a demo area showing simulated AI interaction: user types prompt, thinking indicator, then generated blocks appear one by one.
tasks.details:
1. Demo area styled as mini notebook page (paper-lines background)
2. Typewriter text: 'Create a study planner for next week'
3. After typing: 3-dot pulsing thinking indicator
4. Blocks appear staggered with blockSlideIn animation:
   - Heading: 'Weekly Study Plan'
   - Checklist: 3 items
   - Grid/table with days
5. ScrollTrigger-driven or auto-play on viewport entry
6. No actual API calls — pre-scripted GSAP timeline
tasks.testStrategy: Scroll to AI section — demo should auto-play. Typing should look realistic. Blocks should stagger in smoothly.

tasks.title: BlockTypesBento Hover Micro-Interactions
tasks.description: Add hover micro-interactions to bento cards: scale, shadow increase, and brief sample content that animates in for each block type.
tasks.details:
1. On hover: scale 1.0->1.02, shadow increase
2. Hidden content div revealed by GSAP on mouseenter:
   - TEXT: few lines appear
   - CHECKLIST: checkboxes tick
   - GRID: cells fill in
   - etc.
3. Stagger sample content (0.05s between elements)
4. GSAP reverse on mouseleave
5. Mobile: show sample content always visible (no hover)
6. Keep cards same size — content within existing bounds
tasks.testStrategy: Hover each bento card — sample content should animate in. Leave — should animate out. Mobile: content visible by default.

tasks.title: AestheticsSection Horizontal Carousel
tasks.description: Convert AestheticsSection from vertical cards to a horizontal scrolling carousel with drag/scroll-snap, parallax cards, and navigation.
tasks.details:
1. Horizontal scroll container with CSS scroll-snap
2. Cards: ASMR Sounds, Paper Textures, Sticker Pack, Washi Tape, Color Themes
3. Each card: large visual + short copy
4. Auto-scroll hint on first view (shift 60px left then back)
5. Navigation dots below
6. Mobile: full-width cards with swipe
7. Card parallax: background moves slower than foreground
8. globals.css: scroll-snap utilities if needed
tasks.testStrategy: Drag/scroll carousel — should snap to cards. Verify dots update. Check mobile swipe. Verify auto-scroll hint plays once.

tasks.title: Reintroduce FloatingPapers with LOD System
tasks.description: Re-enable FloatingPapers.tsx as ambient 3D elements during content sections with LOD (Level of Detail) and auto-degradation for performance.
tasks.details:
1. Rewrite FloatingPapers.tsx with LOD:
   - Near camera: paper texture detail
   - Far: simple flat planes
   - 3-4 papers only
2. Papers float at periphery (left/right edges, z=-2 to -5)
3. Create AmbientCanvas.tsx: lightweight R3F canvas overlaying content sections
4. OR extend hero canvas to cover more page
5. Auto-degrade: if FPS < 45, hide FloatingPapers
6. Subtle scroll parallax
7. Don't show during hero — start from PaperStylesSection
tasks.testStrategy: Scroll past hero — floating papers should appear at edges. Verify LOD switching. Throttle CPU — papers should disappear at low FPS.

tasks.title: Notebook Bookend in FinalCTA
tasks.description: Add a 3D closing notebook to FinalCTA that reverses the hero opening animation — narrative bookend (opened at start, closes at end).
tasks.details:
1. Create ClosingNotebook.tsx: reuse HeroNotebook with reversed scroll mapping
2. Book starts open, closes as user scrolls into FinalCTA
3. Small size (scale 0.5-0.6), positioned to side of CTA text
4. Use same ambient canvas from Task 9 or separate tiny R3F canvas
5. Mobile: hide 3D notebook, show only CTA text
6. Lightweight — simple geometry, no post-processing
tasks.testStrategy: Scroll to FinalCTA — notebook should close smoothly. Verify hidden on mobile. Check performance impact is minimal.

tasks.title: Unified Color Flow System
tasks.description: Define and apply a consistent color flow across all sections: dark->parchment->warm white->gray->white->parchment->dark, eliminating the white/parchment ping-pong.
tasks.details:
Color flow:
- Hero: #0f111a (dark)
- StatsStrip: dark-to-parchment gradient (DONE)
- PaperStyles: #fdfbf7 (warm white)
- AIFeature: #f8f6f3 (subtle warm gray)
- Inline Testimonials: transparent
- BlockTypesBento: #ffffff with paper texture overlay
- AestheticsSection: #F4F0EC (parchment)
- FinalCTA: #0f111a (dark, bookends hero)
- Footer: #0a0c14 (darkest)

Add 20px gradient overlap zones between sections for smooth transitions.
tasks.testStrategy: Scroll through entire page — colors should flow naturally with no hard cliffs. Compare before/after screenshots.

tasks.title: Signature Interaction Patterns
tasks.description: Add magnetic CTA buttons (attract toward cursor), ink ripple click effects, and scroll-spy active state in NavBar.
tasks.details:
1. Create useMagneticButton.ts hook:
   - Buttons attract toward cursor within 80px radius
   - Snap back on leave
   - Apply to all primary CTA buttons
2. Ink ripple (CSS-only):
   - ::after pseudo-element expanding ink-drop
   - Dark indigo, 0.4s duration
   - globals.css utility class
3. Create useScrollSpy.ts hook:
   - IntersectionObserver per section
   - Active link gets indigo underline
   - Underline slides between items (GSAP)
4. NavBar.tsx: integrate scroll spy
tasks.testStrategy: Hover near CTA buttons — should attract. Click — ink ripple. Scroll — navbar active state follows. All smooth, no jank.

tasks.title: FinalCTA Typewriter Text Reveal
tasks.description: Add typewriter character-by-character text reveal to FinalCTA heading, followed by handwritten annotation SVGs (arrows, underlines, circles) that draw in.
tasks.details:
1. Create useTypewriter.ts hook:
   - Reveals text character by character
   - Configurable speed (40-60ms per char)
   - ScrollTrigger activation
2. FinalCTA.tsx:
   - Heading uses typewriter reveal
   - After text completes: handwritten SVG annotations draw in
   - stroke-dashoffset animation on SVG paths
   - Caveat/Patrick Hand font for annotations
   - Paper texture background in CTA card
   - Button uses magnetic + ink ripple from Task 12
tasks.testStrategy: Scroll to FinalCTA — text types out character by character. SVG annotations draw in after. Verify reduced-motion shows full text immediately.

tasks.title: Enhanced Inline Testimonials Styling
tasks.description: Polish the InlineTestimonials component (created in Task 3) with masonry-style layout, monogram avatars, handwritten quotation marks, and premium card styling.
tasks.details:
1. Enhance InlineTestimonials.tsx from Task 3:
   - Monogram avatar: first letter in colored circle (indigo/amber/leather rotating)
   - Decorative opening quotation mark in Caveat font, oversized, muted color
   - Quote text slightly larger than body
   - Name + role in smaller muted text
   - Card: subtle border, soft shadow, rounded-2xl
   - GSAP stagger entrance (0.1s between cards)
2. Desktop: 3 cards in row with slight height variation (masonry feel)
3. Mobile: full-width stacked
tasks.testStrategy: Scroll to testimonials — cards should stagger in. Verify monogram colors rotate. Check mobile stacking.

tasks.title: Floating CTA Bar
tasks.description: Add a slim floating CTA bar that appears after 60% scroll, hides when FinalCTA is visible, and provides an always-available conversion path.
tasks.details:
1. Create FloatingCTABar.tsx:
   - 48px tall, dark bg, 'Start Creating — Free' + CTA button
   - Slides up from bottom (GSAP)
   - Dismissible with X button
   - Appears after 60% page scroll
   - Hides when FinalCTA in viewport
   - Hides when scrolled back to hero
   - Z-index: below modal, above content
2. LandingPage.tsx: add component
3. Reduced motion: just appears, no slide
tasks.testStrategy: Scroll past 60% — bar appears. Scroll to FinalCTA — bar hides. Click X — bar dismisses. Scroll to top — bar hides.

tasks.title: Design System Unification
tasks.description: Audit and standardize spacing, border radii, shadows, typography, and accent colors across all sections. Add design tokens to globals.css.
tasks.details:
1. globals.css @theme: add shadow tokens (sm, md, lg), spacing scale
2. All sections: py-24 px-6 (or equivalent clamp)
3. All cards: rounded-2xl (16px)
4. Section headers: font-serif font-bold with consistent clamp
5. Accent colors: only indigo-brand, leather, amber-gold
6. Max-width: max-w-7xl for all sections
7. Fix repeated 'italic colored word in headline' pattern — vary heading styles
8. Audit each section file for inline style inconsistencies
tasks.testStrategy: Visual comparison of all sections — spacing, radii, shadows, fonts should feel unified. No section should look like it belongs to a different site.

tasks.title: Performance Audit and Optimization
tasks.description: Add FPS monitoring, auto-degradation for 3D/animations, lazy loading for heavy components, and verify GSAP cleanup.
tasks.details:
1. Create usePerformanceMonitor.ts hook:
   - Dev-only FPS counter in corner
   - Track rolling average FPS
   - Callback when FPS drops below threshold
2. Auto-degradation:
   - < 45fps for 2s: disable FloatingPapers
   - < 30fps for 2s: disable PostEffects, simplify animations
3. React.lazy + Suspense for: AmbientCanvas, ClosingNotebook
4. Verify all GSAP ScrollTrigger cleanup on unmount
5. Add will-change hints to animated elements
6. Clamp delta in all useFrame loops
tasks.testStrategy: Profile with Chrome DevTools — maintain 60fps on mid-range device. Throttle CPU 4x — verify auto-degradation kicks in.

tasks.title: Reduced Motion and Accessibility
tasks.description: Add prefers-reduced-motion overrides for all new animations, keyboard accessibility for interactive elements, and ARIA attributes for decorative elements.
tasks.details:
1. globals.css: reduced-motion overrides for ALL new animations:
   - Typewriter: show full text immediately
   - Ink line: hidden
   - FloatingPapers: hidden
   - Carousel: no auto-scroll, static grid
   - Magnetic buttons: disabled
2. Focus-visible styles on all interactive elements
3. Carousel: keyboard navigable (arrow keys)
4. ARIA: aria-hidden='true' on ink line, floating papers, decorative canvases
5. Screen reader: skip 3D canvases
6. Test with VoiceOver
tasks.testStrategy: Enable reduced-motion in OS — all animations should be instant or hidden. Tab through page — all interactive elements focusable. Run axe audit.
